allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'\) { Start-Process 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe'; Write-Host 'launched' } else { Write-Host 'not-found-default'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Docker' -Recurse -Filter 'Docker Desktop.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 FullName }")
